message:
chore: simplify homepage layout and expand sitemap coverage

Homepage simplification:
- Remove LazySection wrappers from Projects, Writing, and Threads
  sections. These were adding complexity without significant benefit
  since the AnimatedGrid already handles viewport-based animation.
- Rename flywheelTools import to tldrFlywheelTools to match the
  updated content module export name, clarifying this is TL;DR page data.

Sitemap improvements:
- Add project detail pages (/projects/{slug}) to sitemap.ts for better
  SEO coverage. Uses getProjectSlugs() from content module.
- Set project pages to monthly changeFrequency with 0.7 priority,
  reflecting their importance as core portfolio content.

These changes reduce unnecessary abstraction layers on the homepage
while improving search engine discoverability of individual project pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
